title: [AI5] Implement Peer-to-Peer Data Request with PII Redaction
summary: Implemented a deterministic P2P data request harness with stable message-ID correlation, production-agent response construction, recursive PII redaction, and response verification before dev-agent ingestion.

checks.notes: Validated message ID match, redaction policy application, seven redactions, and zero detected PII leaks.

usage.command: python3 scripts/autonomy/p2p_pii_redacted_data_request.py --requester dev-agent --producer production-agent --query query.json --production-slice production-slice.json --output redacted-response.json
